name: ET: Legacy (Wolffiles)
author: hosting@wolffiles.eu
description: Wolfenstein: Enemy Territory - ET: Legacy dedicated server. Optimized for Wolffiles.eu hosting with mod support, FastDL, and automated pak0 installation. Supports ETPro, jaymod, N!tmod, NoQuarter, Silent Mod, and Legacy Mod.
startup: ./etlded +set dedicated 2 +set net_port {{SERVER_PORT}} +set sv_maxclients {{MAX_PLAYERS}} +set fs_game {{MOD}} +set g_password "{{SERVER_PASSWORD}}" +set rconPassword "{{RCON_PASSWORD}}" +set sv_hostname "{{SERVER_NAME}}" +map {{MAP}} +exec {{CONFIG_FILE}} +set sv_punkbuster 0 +set com_hunkmegs {{HUNK_MEGS}} $(if [ "${OMNIBOT}" == "1" ]; then echo '+set omnibot_enable 1 +set omnibot_path "./legacy/omni-bot"'; else echo '+set omnibot_enable 0'; fi)

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash

apt update
apt install -y curl unzip tar ca-certificates

cd /mnt/server

ETL_VERSION="${ETL_VERSION:-2.83.2}"
ARCH="${ET_ARCH:-x86_64}"

echo "========================================"
echo " Wolffiles.eu ET: Legacy Server Installer"
echo " Version: ${ETL_VERSION} (${ARCH})"
echo "========================================"

## Download ET: Legacy
echo "Downloading ET: Legacy v${ETL_VERSION}..."
DOWNLOAD_URL="https://www.etlegacy.com/download/file/702"

if [ "${ARCH}" == "i386" ]; then
    DOWNLOAD_URL="https://www.etlegacy.com/download/file/701"
fi

curl -sSL -o etlegacy.tar.gz "${DOWNLOAD_URL}" || {
    echo "Primary download failed, trying GitHub releases..."
    curl -sSL -o etlegacy.tar.gz "https://github.com/etlegacy/etlegacy/releases/download/v${ETL_VERSION}/etlegacy-v${ETL_VERSION}-${ARCH}.tar.gz"
}

if [ ! -f etlegacy.tar.gz ]; then
    echo "ERROR: Failed to download ET: Legacy!"
    exit 1
fi

echo "Extracting ET: Legacy..."
tar xzf etlegacy.tar.gz --strip-components=1
rm -f etlegacy.tar.gz

## Rename binary
if [ -f "etlded.${ARCH}" ] && [ ! -f "etlded" ]; then
    mv "etlded.${ARCH}" etlded
fi
chmod +x etlded

## Download original ET pak files (pak0.pk3, pak1.pk3, pak2.pk3)
if [ ! -f "etmain/pak0.pk3" ]; then
    echo "Downloading original ET asset files..."
    curl -sSL -o et260b.zip "https://filebase.trackbase.net/et/full/et260b.x86_full.zip" || {
        echo "Mirror 1 failed, trying alternative..."
        curl -sSL -o et260b.zip "https://wolffiles.eu/downloads/et260b.x86_full.zip" || {
            echo "WARNING: Could not download ET assets. pak0.pk3 must be uploaded manually."
        }
    }
    
    if [ -f et260b.zip ]; then
        echo "Extracting ET assets..."
        mkdir -p /tmp/et-extract
        unzip -o et260b.zip -d /tmp/et-extract 2>/dev/null || true
        
        ## Find and copy pak files
        find /tmp/et-extract -name "pak*.pk3" -exec cp {} etmain/ \;
        
        rm -rf /tmp/et-extract et260b.zip
    fi
fi

## Create necessary directories
mkdir -p etmain
mkdir -p legacy
mkdir -p .etlegacy
mkdir -p logs

## Create default server config if not exists
if [ ! -f "etmain/etl_server.cfg" ]; then
    cat > etmain/etl_server.cfg << 'CFG'
// Wolffiles.eu ET: Legacy Server Config
// Generated by Wolffiles Hosting

set sv_hostname      "ET Server - Wolffiles.eu"
set sv_maxclients    24
set g_maxGameClients 0

// Network
set sv_maxRate       25000
set sv_minPing       0
set sv_maxPing       0
set sv_floodProtect  1

// Game
set g_gametype       6
set timelimit        30
set fraglimit        0
set g_alliedmaxlives 0
set g_axismaxlives   0
set g_warmup         30
set g_doWarmup       1

// Map Rotation
set sv_mapRotation   "map oasis; map goldrush; map battery; map radar; map railgun; map fuel_dump"
set sv_mapRotationCurrent ""

// Logging
set g_log            "logs/etlded.log"
set g_logSync        1

// Downloads (FastDL via Wolffiles)
set sv_allowDownload 1
set sv_wwwDownload   1
set sv_wwwBaseURL    ""
set sv_wwwFallbackURL ""

// Anti-Cheat
set sv_punkbuster    0

// LUA
set lua_modules      ""
CFG
fi

## Verify installation
if [ -f "etlded" ] && [ -f "etmain/pak0.pk3" ]; then
    echo "========================================"
    echo " Installation erfolgreich!"
    echo " ET: Legacy v${ETL_VERSION}"
    echo " pak0.pk3: $(ls -lh etmain/pak0.pk3 | awk '{print $5}')"
    echo "========================================"
else
    echo "WARNING: Installation may be incomplete."
    [ ! -f "etlded" ] && echo " - etlded binary missing!"
    [ ! -f "etmain/pak0.pk3" ] && echo " - pak0.pk3 missing! Upload manually."
fi

variables.name: Server Name
variables.description: The name of your server as shown in the server browser.

variables.name: Default Map
variables.description: The map loaded when the server starts.

variables.name: Mod
variables.description: The game mod to load. Options: legacy, etpro, jaymod, nitmod, noquarter, silent, etmain

variables.name: RCON Password
variables.description: Remote console password for server administration.

variables.name: Server Password
variables.description: Password required to join the server. Leave empty for public server.

variables.name: Config File
variables.description: Server config file to execute on startup.

variables.name: Hunk Megs
variables.description: Memory allocation in MB. Higher = more maps/resources supported.
